title: Hidden Armour
description: Toggle visibility of armor and other render stuff.
body:
# Hidden Armour **Hidden Armour** is a lightweight Fabric mod that gives you full control over the rendering of armor, elytra, nametags, enchantment glint, and selected mob equipment. ## Key Features - 🔒 **Toggle Player Armor** Show or hide armor rendering on players at the press of a button. - 🧭 **Scope Modes (All / Self / Others)** Choose whether hidden armor applies to everyone, only yourself, or only other players. - 🎚️ **Opacity Slider** Use Opacity (0-100%) instead of a strict on/off look while armor hiding is active. - 👕 **Per Piece Toggles**
Toggle exactly which armor pieces are hidden. - 🪶 **Include/Exclude Elytra** Decide whether elytra should be hidden together with armor. - ✨ **Disable Enchantment Glint** Toggle the enchantment glint effect on tools and 2D items. - 🏷️ **Hide Nametags** Toggle the visibility of nametags. - 🛡️ **Shield Visibility Control** Hide or show shields on player renders (non-blocking state). - 🐴 **Mob Equipment Controls** Hide or reveal equipment on horses, wolves, and nautilus. - 🎃 **What Won’t Be Hidden** Heads, carved pumpkins, and other non-armor items will still render normally. - ⚙️ **In-Game Configuration** Accessible via hotkey or ModMenu. ## Controls - **Toggle Armor:** `J` - **Open Settings:** `U` - Both keybinds can be remapped in **Settings → Controls**. ## Commands - `/hiddenarmour enable|disable|status` - `/hiddenarmour elytra enable|disable|status` - `/hiddenarmour scope all|self|others|status` ---

--- ## 🔗 Dependencies ### Required ### Optional (Recommended) --- ## 👥 Credits - **Update Help:** - **1.21.9 / 1.21.10:** [L3-N0X](https://github.com/L3-N0X) ![L3-N0X](https://minotar.net/avatar/L3N0X/24)
